objective: Stabilize live smoke navigation by replacing fragile networkidle waits and preserve strong diagnostics for board readiness.
non_goals: multi-forum runtime implementation beyond ppomppu adapter

completed: Observer and publisher navigation waits changed from networkidle to domcontentloaded with timeout budget
Observer now fails fast with BOARD_CONTENT_UNAVAILABLE when board rows never attach
xvfb-run smoke test executes and returns deterministic board-readiness diagnostics
gaps: Board page returns title/status OK in some runs but row selectors still resolve to zero
Live publisher flow remains blocked until board row/selectors and write-entry path are verified under stable session/IP context

acceptance_criteria: Smoke run does not fail on networkidle timeout for base board navigation
Failures are explicit between access denied vs content unavailable vs login/write-entry
Next session can continue from deterministic diagnostics without re-triaging transport timing

implementation_plan.name: Selector drift verification
actions: Capture post-load DOM snapshot of row region when BOARD_CONTENT_UNAVAILABLE occurs
Adjust observer row selectors to current board markup if needed

implementation_plan.name: Write-entry path verification
actions: Confirm logged-in state and write button visibility under same profile/session
Re-run staged checklist (observer, dry-run publisher, live-submit validation)

practical_recommendations: Start next session from this handover as single seed context
Use xvfb-run for smoke/debug in this runtime when headed mode is required
Keep domcontentloaded + explicit readiness checks to avoid ad/script-induced networkidle hangs
pending_items: Board selector/session validation with fresh artifacts
Commit pending code and handover/state updates

decisions.title: Use domcontentloaded plus explicit readiness checks for board navigation
decisions.rationale: Networkidle is unreliable on ad-heavy pages and caused false-negative smoke failures

constraints: Do not weaken safety guards before enabling live publish
Maintain strict env and contract validation at startup
Preserve compatibility with current Express + React + Playwright stack
next_actions: Capture row-region DOM artifact when BOARD_CONTENT_UNAVAILABLE appears
Adjust selector strategy if markup drift is confirmed
Re-run staged checklist and commit changes
